parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: The unique UUID of the course

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive partial match against title and tags

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description:
Filter by exact tag (case-sensitive). Repeatable; multiple
values are AND-matched (a guide must carry every supplied
tag to be returned).

parameters.name: page_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of guides per page

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque keyset cursor token from the previous page
